description_long: This is a rectangular, lidded parcel box with rounded corners and a slightly domed lid. The exterior is covered in a reddish-brown color with a repeating pattern of small, dark triangles, giving it a decorative and somewhat modern appearance. The box features a visible seam where the lid meets the base, and one side displays a metallic label holder, likely for identification or address information. Another side is detailed with a vertical row of metallic rivets or fasteners, suggesting a reinforced or hinged section for durability. The surface appears to be made of a sturdy material, possibly metal or reinforced cardboard, with a matte finish. The overall design is utilitarian yet stylish, suitable for use as a storage or delivery parcel in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, lidded parcel box with rounded corners, reddish-brown patterned exterior, and metallic details including a label holder and rivets.
description_view_0: The front view shows the smooth, patterned surface of the box with no visible hardware or label.
description_view_1: This side view highlights a vertical row of metallic rivets or fasteners along the seam, suggesting reinforcement or a hinge.
description_view_2: This view displays a metallic label holder on the box, likely for identification or address purposes.
description_view_3: Similar to view 1, this side also features a vertical row of metallic rivets or fasteners, but no label holder is visible.
